title: cotyledon oreades
intro: Cotyledon oreades, commonly known as Bear's Head Cotyledon, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, likely due to its therapeutic actions such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cotyledon oreades include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Further research is necessary to fully understand the plant's effects on human health and its potential applications in traditional medicine.

side_effects: Cotyledon oreades can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems.
